statement: In every magma, Equation 2758 (`x = ((y * y) * (z * y)) * y`) implies Equation 857 (`x = x * ((y * z) * (y * y))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0113
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, x = (op (op (op y y) (op z y)) y)) :
    ∀ x y z : G, x = (op x (op (op y z) (op y y)))
